headline: Vertiv and 6 More Stocks to Play the AI Buildout Boom
summary: The AI buildout is going strong., but the future is murky. A Mizuno analyst has identified seven stocks, including Honeywell International, to play what’s going on right now.

headline: Heatwave Strengthens Bullish Case For Utility ETFs, HVAC Stocks Amid Surging Power Demand
summary: A record heatwave is boosting interest in utility ETFs as rising power demand, grid modernization, climate adaptation drive long-term opportunities.
